# Version 4.151.0 (Unreleased)
> **Windows Nano Server font support**

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 4.151.0 adds FreeType-based font rendering for Windows Nano Server containers.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this preview line.*

## Platform

- **Windows Nano Server font support via FreeType** — SkiaSharp now uses FreeType for font rendering on Windows Nano Server, enabling text drawing in containerized environments that lack the standard GDI font stack. — ❤️ [@jeffska](https://github.com/jeffska) ([#4280](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4280))

## Community Contributors ❤️

Thank you to everyone who contributed to this release!
